data.biography: 新加坡著名演员和歌手，2016年来内地发展，出演作品有《泡沫之夏》《万水千山总是情》《延禧攻略》《超级APP》《少女的奇幻日记》
data.name: 王冠逸

data.biography:
Wong Guanyi (nome em inglês: Lawrence) é um ator e cantor de Singapura nascido na Malásia. Aos 19 anos, ele fazia parte de um grupo masculino e estava prestes a lançar o álbum no Japão, mas isso não se concretizou porque a empresa investiu recursos em outra cantora. Atualmente ele tem muitas músicas lançadas, incluindo 2 álbuns.

Assinou contrato com a Mediacorp, onde atuou em diversos shows. Depois disso, ele desempenhou o papel de um adolescente rebelde em The Promise, um filme do Channel U, que o indicou como 'Personagem Masculino Favorito' no Star Awards 2010.

Em 2016, ele assinou contrato com uma empresa de gestão chinesa. Ele alcançou a fama com o show Story of Yanxi Palace (2018) e ficou em 35º lugar na lista dos Artistas Mais Influentes da China.
新加坡著名演員和歌手，2016 年來內地發展，出演作品有《泡沫之夏》《萬水千山總是情》《延禧攻略》《超級 APP》《少女的奇幻日記》
data.name: 王冠逸

data.biography:
Gary Beadle (born 8 July 1965) is a British actor. Beadle was raised as one of five children in Bermondsey, South London, where he was baptised a Roman Catholic. As children, he and his elder brother Rikki produced a version of the 1976 youth musical-gangster film Bugsy Malone for Southwark London Borough Council. Directed by Rikki who starred as Talula, Gary played janitor Fizzy. Rikki tried to invite the original film's director Alan Parker to the performance, but his assistant did come, and used her connections to get Rikki, Gary and their younger sister into the community-based Anna Scher Theatre School. After developing a love of hip hop, and especially Run-D.M.C. and the Sugarhill Gang, Beadle moved to New York City in his early twenties. On his return to London, using the moniker 'Pretty Boy Gee', he formed a rap group called The City Limits Crew alongside 'Little Stevie Bee'. In 1985, the duo released two 12" singles, "Keep It On" (w/ "The Mutant Rockers") and "Fresher Than Ever" on the independent record label Survival Records. Also that year, the crew recorded a session on BBC Radio 1 for John Peel and performed at Electro Rock, an international hip hop event at the Hippodrome.

He also worked as a comedian but started to work as an actor, and appeared in The Young Ones (BBC 1984); the 1986 film Absolute Beginners; Jerusalem, the 1987 short film starring the Style Council pop group; Making Out in 1989–91 as Simon; the BBC sitcom Absolutely Fabulous, where he played the gay lover of Eddie's (Jennifer Saunders) ex-husband Justin; the TV series Born to Run in 1997; the ITV police drama The Bill and BBC medical drama Casualty (2001). In 2001, he started in the role of Paul Trueman in EastEnders. A loveable rogue, Beadle left the role when his contract was due to terminate - as he had not appreciated the director and script writers wanting his character to become a drug dealer. He therefore departed from the show and his exit featured the character being killed off by his gangland boss Andy Hunter (Michael Higgs). In 2007, he appeared in BBC Three comedy Thieves Like Us. In 2008, he appeared in The Sarah Jane Adventures series 2 as Clyde Langer's father, Paul. In 2009, he appeared in Malice in Wonderland as DJ Felix Chester, a Cheshire Cat allusion. In 2010, he appeared in the Royal Court Theatre's Sucker Punch by Roy Williams. In 2012, he appeared in Hustle as a police officer. In 2015, he played Docker in BBC One drama The Interceptor and also featured in the Ron Howard-directed film In the Heart of the Sea which was released in December 2015. In 2016, he performed as Abioseh, an ex-tribesman in the Royal National Theatre's production of Les Blancs. He also starred as a Detective Chief Inspector in an episode of Silent Witness.
data.name: Gary Beadle

data.biography: Jovan Adepo (born September 6, 1988) is a British-born American actor. He is known for his role as Cory Maxson in the film adaptation of Fences (2016), and also had starring roles in the 2018 film Overlord and as Lionel Jefferson in CBS' All in the Family/The Jeffersons special. Adepo was featured in the series When They See Us, the second season of Prime Video’s Jack Ryan, and the Facebook series Sorry for Your Loss. He plays Michael Murphy in the HBO series The Leftovers and in 2019 appeared in Watchmen as Hooded Justice. For the latter, he was nominated for the Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Supporting Actor in a Limited Series or Movie. He also starred as Larry Underwood in the Paramount+ miniseries of Stephen King's The Stand.
data.name: Jovan Adepo

data.biography:
约翰·艾德坡（英语：Jovan Adepo，1988年9月6日—），英国裔美国男演员，知名演出作品如电影《藩篱》、《霸主》，以及电视剧《节哀顺变》、《杰克·莱恩》和《末日逼近》。2019年出演电视剧《守护者》中的蒙面侠客，为此提名黄金时段艾美奖最佳迷你剧或电视电影最佳男配角。

约翰·艾德坡生于牛津郡上海福德。母亲是来自伦敦的英国尼日利亚人，父亲是来自田纳西州查塔努加的非裔美国人。外祖父法泰·艾德坡（Fatai Adepo）是尼日利亚前总统奥卢塞贡·奥巴桑乔的特别顾问。他在2岁时随家人移居美国。他于马里兰州华尔道夫长大，曾在学校和教堂演出。

艾德坡就读于马里兰州布伊州立大学，获得政治学和哲学学士学位。在学习政治学时，他开始学习创意写作课程。后来他决定搬到洛杉矶成为一名作家，并在广告工作室工作以增加收入。他为了预订广告、赚取额外收入而参加了表演课程，此后他对表演的兴趣与日俱增，并在许多著名导师的指导下学习表演。
data.name: 约翰·艾德坡

data.biography: Ο Jovan Adepo είναι Βρετανοαμερικανός ηθοποιός. Έκανε το ντεμπούτο του στην ταινία μεγάλου μήκους στο δράμα εποχής Fences, το οποίο ακολούθησαν ρόλοι στην ψυχολογική ταινία τρόμου Mother!, στην ταινία δράσης τρόμου Overlord, στην κωμωδία-δράμα εποχής Babylon και στο δράμα Οι Τρεις Κόρες του.
data.name: Τζιόβαν Αντέπο

data.biography:
約翰·艾德波（英語：賈方·艾德波，1988 年 9 月 6 日—），英國裔美國男演員，知名演出作品如電影《藩籬》、《霸主》，以及電視劇《節哀順變》、《傑克·萊恩》和《末日逼近》。2019 年出演電視劇《保衞奇俠》中的蒙面俠客，為此提名黃金時段艾美獎最佳迷你劇或電視電影最佳男配角。

約翰·艾德波生於牛津郡上海福德。母親是來自倫敦的英國奈及利亞人，父親是來自田納西州查塔努加的非裔美國人。外祖父法泰·艾德波（Fatai Adepo）是奈及利亞前總統奧盧塞貢·奧巴桑喬的特別顧問。他在 2 歲時隨家人移居美國。他於馬裏蘭州華爾道夫長大，曾在學校和教堂演出。

艾德波就讀於馬裏蘭州布伊州立大學，獲得政治學和哲學學士學位。在學習政治學時，他開始學習創意寫作課程。後來他決定搬到洛杉磯成為一名作家，並在廣告工作室工作以增加收入。他為了預訂廣告、賺取額外收入而參加了表演課程，此後他對錶演的興趣與日俱增，並在許多著名導師的指導下學習表演。
data.name: 賈方·艾德波

data.biography:
Jovan Adepo, 6 Eylül 1988 tarihinde Oxfordshire, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. İngiliz-Nijeryalı bir anne ve Afro-Amerikan bir babanın çocuğu olarak çifte vatandaşlığa sahiptir. Oyunculuk, Adepo için ilk kariyer tercihi değildi; Maryland'deki Bowie State Üniversitesi'nde Siyaset Bilimi ve Felsefe okudu. Mezun olduktan sonra yazar olmak amacıyla Los Angeles'a taşındı. Karakter gelişimini daha iyi anlamak için aldığı oyunculuk dersleri sırasında yeteneğinin keşfedilmesi ve hocalarının teşvikiyle profesyonel olarak bu alana yöneldi.

Kısa sürede yeteneği fark edildi ve ilk büyük çıkışını HBO'nun beğenilen dizisi "The Leftovers"da (2015-2017) canlandırdığı Michael Murphy karakteriyle yaptı. Bu dizinin ikinci sezonuna katılmasına rağmen performansıyla büyük beğeni topladı. Sinemadaki atılımı ise çok daha görkemli oldu. 2016 yılında, Denzel Washington'ın yönettiği ve başrolünü Viola Davis ile paylaştığı "Fences" filminde onların oğlunu canlandırdı. Eleştirmenlerden tam not alan ve Oscar'a aday gösterilen bu filmdeki rolü, Adepo'yu sinema dünyasının en umut vadeden genç yeteneklerinden biri olarak konumlandırdı. Ardından J.J. Abrams'ın yapımcılığını üstlendiği II. Dünya Savaşı temalı korku filmi "Overlord" (2018) ile başrol oyuncusu olarak yeteneğini sergiledi.

Ancak Adepo'nun kariyerindeki en büyük eleştirel başarılarından biri, HBO'nun çığır açan dizisi "Watchmen"deki (2019) performansıyla geldi. Dizide canlandırdığı Hooded Justice karakteri, ona Sınırlı Dizilerde En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu dalında Primetime Emmy Ödülü adaylığı getirdi. Bu başarıyı, Ava DuVernay'in yönettiği "When They See Us" (2019) ve Stephen King uyarlaması "The Stand" (2020) gibi prestijli projeler takip etti. Damien Chazelle'in yönettiği "Babil" (Babylon) (2022) filminde ise caz trompetçisi Sidney Palmer karakterine hayat verdi.

Yakın dönemde Adepo, başrol oyuncusu olarak kariyerinde yeni bir sayfa açtı. Netflix'in dünya çapında ses getiren bilimkurgu dizisi "3 Cisim Problemi"nde (3 Body Problem) (2024) canlandırdığı bilim insanı Saul Durand rolüyle başrol kadrosunda yer aldı. Jovan Adepo, kısa sürede Hollywood'un en saygın ve aranan aktörlerinden biri haline gelmiş, genellikle karmaşık ve düşündürücü projelerdeki derinlikli performanslarıyla tanınan bir isimdir.

Mahiro Takasugi (高杉 真宙, born July 4, 1996) is a Japanese actor who is affiliated with Spice Power. He is best known for his role as the character Mitsuzane Kureshima/Kamen Rider Ryugen from the Kamen Rider series Kamen Rider Gaim.
data.name: Mahiro Takasugi

data.biography: 日本男演员。2009年，高杉真宙出演了舞台剧《エブリ リトル シング'09》，从而正式出道。2010年1月17日，他参演的个人首部电视剧《不平则鸣2》播出；同年，出演了个人首部电影《5年后的情书》；10月1日，他参演的历史片《大奥：女将军与她的后宫三千美男》上映。2012年，他主演的个人首部电影《四重奏！》上映。2013年10月6日，其出演的特摄剧《假面骑士铠武》播出。2015年2月1日，高杉真宙凭借他主演的电影《御宅大冒险》获得了第36届横滨电影节最佳新人奖；7月17日，其出演的青春校园剧《表参道高校合唱部！》播出。2016年，他主演了舞台剧《暗狩人》。2017年7月8日，他主演的青春校园片《逆光之时》上映；10月3日，其主演的校园喜剧《濑户内海》播出；同年，他获得了每日电影大奖年度新人奖。2018年，出演漫改校园剧《狂赌之渊》；同年，在动画电影《我想吃掉你的胰脏》中为男主人公志贺春树配音。2019年1月25日，其出演的悬疑片《十二个想死的孩子》上映；3月18日，他主演的漫改爱情剧《高岭与花》首播；10月25日，他主演的推理悬疑片《超·少年侦探团NEO-Beginning-》上映。2024年，出演大河剧《致光之君》及电视剧《隔壁的护士助理》。
data.name: 高杉真宙

data.biography: 高杉真宙，日本男演員，福岡縣出身，2021年4月11日與原經紀公司 Sweet Power 合約到期，同年成立個人事務所 POSTERS。

data.overview: Chàng trai bình thường nọ rốt cuộc lại đến một thế giới khác và có năng lực mang đến những sản phẩm từ một siêu thị hiện đại, với những kết quả ngon lành trong thế giới mới này.

data.overview: Khi một loạt tội ác bạo lực kinh hoàng làm rung chuyển ngôi làng bản địa hẻo lánh ở miền Bắc Alaska, một người đàn ông bắt đầu hành trình điều tra, để rồi phát hiện ra mối liên hệ siêu nhiên đầy rùng rợn.

data.biography:
Nathan Castle is a South African-born actor, best known for his roles in Eraser: Reborn, Slumber Party Massacre and Reflection Point which he won best actor at the LA International Festigious film festival.

He also has landed roles on HBO's Raised By Wolves, Amazon Prime's series Power as well as the Netflix live action adaptation of One Piece.
data.name: Nathan Castle

data.biography: Tomer Capone é um ator e modelo israelense de cinema e televisão. Ele estrelou na popular televisão exportada israelense, como Reféns e na série de televisão de suspense político Fauda. Em 2016, ele recebeu o prêmio Ophir de melhor ator coadjuvante em uma semana e um dia. Atualmente o seu maior papel em destaque é o Francês na série da Prime Vídeo, The Boys.
data.name: Tomer Capone

data.biography: Tomer Capone (born July 15, 1985) is an Israeli actor. He has starred in popular Israeli exported television such as Hostages and the political thriller television series Fauda. In 2016 he was awarded an Ophir Award for Best Supporting Actor in One Week and a Day. He stars in When Heroes Fly and in the Amazon series The Boys.
data.name: Tomer Capone

data.biography: Tomer Capone (également Kapon ou Kappon ou Capon, hébreu : תומר קאפון ; né le 15 juillet 1985) est un acteur israélien. Il a joué dans la télévision israélienne populaire exportée comme Otages et la série télévisée à suspense politique Fauda. En 2016, il a reçu le prix Ophir du meilleur acteur dans un second rôle dans Une semaine et un jour. Il joue dans When Heroes Fly et dans la série Amazon The Boys.
data.name: Tomer Capon

data.biography: 托默·卡彭（Tomer Capone，1985年7月15日-），以色列演员。他曾出演过以色列流行的出口电视，如《人质》和政治惊悚电视连续剧《福达》。2016 年，他获得了 Ophir 奖《一周零一天》最佳男配角奖。他出演了《当英雄飞翔》和亚马逊剧集《男孩们》。
data.name: 托默·卡彭

data.biography: Tomer Capone (d. 15 Temmuz 1985) İsrailli bir aktördür. Hostages ve politik gerilim televizyon dizisi Fauda gibi İsrail'in ihraç ettiği popüler televizyon dizilerinde rol almıştır. 2016 yılında One Week and a Day filmiyle En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu dalında Ophir Ödülü'ne layık görülmüştür. Kahramanlar Uçarken ve Amazon dizisi The Boys'da rol almaktadır.
data.name: Tomer Capone

data.biography: 託默·卡本（Tomer Capone，1985 年 7 月 15 日-），以色列演員。他曾出演過以色列流行的出口電視，如《拐帶風暴》和政治驚悚電視聯續劇《福達》。2016 年，他獲得了 Ophir 獎《一週零一天》最佳男配角獎。他出演了《當英雄飛翔》和亞馬遜劇集《男孩們》。
data.name: 託莫·卡本
